command:
echo '=== DELEGATOR BINARY ==='
which moreno-delegate 2>/dev/null || find /home/jose -name 'moreno-delegate' 2>/dev/null | head -5
find /home/jose -name 'moreno_unified_delegator*' -o -name 'delegator*' 2>/dev/null | grep -v '.git' | head -10

echo '=== CONFIG ==='
cat /home/jose/.config/moreno-unified-delegator/config.json 2>/dev/null

echo '=== DELEGATOR HELP ==='
/home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-delegate --help 2>&1 | head -40 || echo 'not at that path'

echo '=== FIND DELEGATE BIN ==='
find /home/jose/.local -name 'moreno*' 2>/dev/null
find /usr/local -name 'moreno*' 2>/dev/null

echo DONE_1870
